response.justification: The candidate lacks substantial C++ experience in industrial or embedded systems contexts, with only a brief, non-detailed mention of C++ in a 6-month role at National Instruments; their career is overwhelmingly focused on JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with no evidence of STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or industrial IoT protocols required for the role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems.
Demonstrated leadership in open-source projects and technical mentoring through workshops and talks.
Extensive DevOps and CI/CD infrastructure experience with Docker, GitLab, and Kubernetes.
concerns: Minimal and outdated C++ exposure (6 months, 10 years ago), with no recent industrial C++ development.
No evidence of experience with STL, message brokers, MQTT, REST in C++, or IEC 62443 security standards.
Core technical stack is JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang, with no Azure, IoT industrial protocols, or C++-centric architecture work.
